summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected; no merge, fix, close, label, or comment mutation is planned.

actions.reason: Draft maintainer-owned script logging work is not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate in this inventory shard; keep it independently open for proof or author follow-up.
This looks like a focused candidate fix for #86034, but accepting the task terminal contract is a maintainer technical judgment and merge is blocked in this plan-only inventory job.

The PR is related to the closed per-turn thinkingLevel bug and adjacent open model-switch decision, but the possible superseding fix is unhydrated and the current proof gate is failing; keep related rather than closing.
This is useful docs tooling work related to #44293, but the issue is already closed, proof is missing, and review-bot comments are unresolved; keep related rather than close or merge.
The PR is related to and plausibly implements #39923, but proof is failing and the unresolved migration data-loss review finding blocks closeout or merge-style treatment.

needs_human: #86279 requires maintainer technical judgment on whether the task terminal contract change is the right behavior before any merge path is considered.
